task_completion.description: Log in to OpenSIS as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the page to add a new staff member.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a form or page in OpenSIS for adding a new staff member or user.

task_completion.description: Select 'Teacher' as the profile for the new staff member.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field for Profile, Role, or User Type shows 'Teacher' selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the first name, last name, and email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields for First Name, Last Name, and Email contain 'Margaret', 'Chen', and 'margaret.chen@school.edu' respectively.
Form fields for Username and Password contain 'mchen' and 'Teacher@456' (or masked password characters).
A success message indicating the staff member was added, or the staff member 'Margaret Chen' appears in the staff list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the OpenSIS application is visible, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to insert the user directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows with SQL commands, database clients, or scripts are visible.

integrity.description: The success message or staff list is from the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message or staff list is styled consistently with the OpenSIS UI, not a plain text file or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a staff member in OpenSIS with First Name: 'Margaret', Last Name: 'Chen', Username: 'mchen', Email: 'margaret.chen@school.edu', and Profile: 'Teacher'. Verify these exact details are entered in the OpenSIS web interface.
